mnemonics: Father Changes House Daily, Gets Current Working Directory
File Change Directory, Get Current Working Directory
keyPoints: fchdir() changes the current working directory to the one associated with the file descriptor fd
getcwd() returns a string representing the current working directory
Device special files represent hardware devices, allowing programs to interact with them as if they were regular files
commonMistakes: Forgetting to check the return values of fchdir() and getcwd() for errors
Not closing the file descriptor after using fchdir()
Incorrectly assuming that device special files behave exactly like regular files
